fields.title: Migrate Ralph loop state from promptProfile to pinned executionProfile
fields.description: Ralph is already closest to the target model. Replace its prompt-profile persistence with full execution-profile pinning so iteration sessions reproduce mode/model/thinking and future policy constraints through one shared contract.
fields.design: Change Ralph schema, repo, service, and adapter boundaries from promptProfile to executionProfile. Capture the current resolved execution profile on /ralph start. Reapply the pinned execution profile on each iteration session before continuing. Keep failure behavior strict: if the pinned profile cannot be resolved or applied, pause the loop with a clear error instead of falling back. Use read-compat only if needed for old Ralph state files.
